title: ozothamnus hookeri
intro: Ozothamnus hookeri, also known as Hooker's pepperwort or white everlasting, is a shrub-like plant native to Australia, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ozothamnus hookeri include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and easing symptoms of colds, coughs, and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Ozothamnus hookeri is often used as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to apply its medicinal properties.
